app.title: Digital Scribe
app.subtitle: Improve your writing skills through typing practice
app.footer: Digital Scribe - Improve your typing skills with steady practice

source.title: Choose Text Source
source.fileHint: Upload .txt, .md, .xlsx, or .csv files for typing practice.
source.ocrHint: Upload a book or document image to extract text automatically.

typing.emptyTitle: Select or upload a text to begin
typing.completedHint: Great work! Press reset to try again
typing.instructionStart: Click the text area above and start typing
typing.instructionFocus: Click the text area to keep typing

fileUploader.unsupported: Unsupported file format. Only .txt, .md, .xlsx, .xls, and .csv are allowed.
fileUploader.maxSize: File size must be {size} or less.
fileUploader.readError: An error occurred while reading the file.

ocr.imageOnly: Only image files can be uploaded.
ocr.maxSize: Image size must be 10MB or less.
ocr.notFound: No text was found in the image. Please try another image.
ocr.processError: An error occurred while processing OCR.

kids.title: Word Sprint Challenge
kids.subtitle: Type as many words as you can in 60 seconds!
